ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-18-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Slapp)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James Brandan Krause, Esq. of THE LAW OFFICES OF ANDREW M. ZACKS 956-8100, for defendant Janis Platt moving for a special motion to strike
R. Boyd McSparran, Esq. of GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN 673-5600, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT JANIS PLATT's
Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Slapp) -- 3rd c/a - granted re:
references to small claims action. 1st c/a - granted re: reference to collection of additional sums. Otherwise denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter:
Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
